stemHtml: An aircraft has been subjected to an act of unlawful interference and must depart from its assigned cruising level without being able first to make radiotelephony contact with ATC. No regional procedures have been established for the airspace in which it is currently located. Therefore, it should proceed at a level that differs from the cruising levels normally used for IFR by…

options.a: 200 m, in an area where a vertical separation of 300 m is applied.
options.b: 150 m, in an area where a vertical separation of 300 m is applied.
options.c: 400 m, in an area where a vertical separation of 600 m is applied.
options.d: 250 m, in an area where a vertical separation of 600 m is applied.
